subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest for the abode of the Beloved! From the intensity of thy longing, thou art as a blazing fire, and from thy thirst, thou art like an unbridled flame [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق کوی دوست از شدت شوق چون آتشی و از تشنگی چو نیران سرکش حرارتت سرایت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
